persian_text: تا اگر ابری بر آید چرخپوش اندرین روزن بود نورش به جوش
english_translation: So that if a cloud arise and cover the sky in this window its light will be coruscating

persian_text: پاسبانی خفت و دزد اسباب برد رختها را زیر هر خاکی فشرد
english_translation: A certain watchman fell asleep The robbers carried off the goods and secreted the articles under any piece of earth

persian_text: زود ویران کن دکان و بازگرد سوی سبزه و گلبنان و آبخورد
english_translation: Quickly lay waste that shop and turn back to the greenery and the rosetress and the wateringplace

persian_text: گفت تمییزم تو دادی ای خدا گفت پس تمییز چون نبود مرا
english_translation: He replied Thou O God gavest me discernment He said Then how should I not have discernment

persian_text: آن پشیمانی و یا رب رفت از او شست بر آیینه زنگ پنج تو
english_translation: That repenting and O Lord are gone from him fivefold rust has settled on the mirror

persian_text: چرخ چارم هم ز نور تو پرست حاش لله که مقامت آخرست
english_translation: The Fourth Heaven moreover is filled with thy light God forbid that the Stable is thy abode

persian_text: هست یک نامش ولی الدولتین هست یک نعتش امام القبلتین
english_translation: One name of him is owner of the two empires one description of him is Imám of the two qiblas

persian_text: پس سلیمان همتی باید که او بگذرد زین صد هزاران رنگ و بو
english_translation: Therefore one must needs possess the high aspiration of a Solomon in order to escape from these myriads of colours and perfumes

persian_text: باز گفتی دور از آن خو و خصال اینچنین تخلیط ژاژست و خیال
english_translation: Again he would say He is far removed from this disposition and qualities such wild accusations are drivel and fancy

persian_text: جذب آبست این عطش در جان ما ما از آن او و او هم آن ما
english_translation: This thirst in our souls is the attraction exerted by the Water we are Its and It is ours

persian_text: تازه میگیر و کهن را میسپار که هر امسالت فزونست از سه پار
english_translation: Take the new and surrender the old for every this year of thine is superior to three last years

persian_text: تا ببینم غایت حلمت شها اه کرا باشد مجال این کرا
english_translation: That I might see the utmost limit of Thy clemency O King Ah who would be capable of this who

persian_text: اندرین معنی بپرس آن خیره را که چنین کی دیده بودی شیره را
english_translation: On this matter ask the heedless  When did you see must like this

persian_text: حسن ظنی بر دل ایشان گشود که نپوشند از عمی جامهی کبود
english_translation: He hath revealed to their hearts such a good opinion that they do not put on the blue garb on account of any sorrow

persian_text: باز مرغان خبیر هوشمند کردهاند از دانه خود را خشکبند
english_translation: Again the knowing and prudent birds have debarred themselves from the grain

persian_text: بر تو میننهیم منتای کریم لیک شرح عزت تستای ندیم
english_translation: We confer no obligation on thee  O noble one but tis to explain thy honour  O booncompanion

persian_text: چون درختست آدمی و بیخ عهد بیخ را تیمار میباید به جهد
english_translation: Man resembles a tree and the root is the covenant  the root must be cherished with all ones might

persian_text: هم از آن خورشید زد بر روزنی لیک از راه و سوی معهود نی
english_translation: From that Sun too strike upon a window but not in the ordinary way and direction

persian_text: گفت حق فرمود ما را بندهای است صافی و شایسته و فرخندهای است
english_translation: He said God said We have a servant he is a pure and worthy and blessed one

persian_text: خود ترا کاری نبود آن جایگاه که به بیهوده کنی این عزم راه
english_translation: Was there nothing for you to do in the place  that you should idly set out upon this expedition

persian_text: تو مترس و مهلتش ده دمدراز گو سپه گرد آر و صد حیلت بساز
english_translation: Have thou no fear and give him a lengthy respite bid him bring together his host and prepare a hundred devices

persian_text: گر بریزی خاک و صد خاکسترش بر سر نور او برآید بر سرش
english_translation: Though you pour earth and a hundred ashes over its light it will come up above them

persian_text: کار کوثر چیست که هر سوخته گردد از وی نابت و اندوخته
english_translation: What is the work of Kawthar by which every one that has been burned is made to grow and becomes redintegrated

persian_text: آن جلود و آن عظام ریخته فارسان گشته غبار انگیخته
english_translation: Those crumbled skins and bones have become horsemen and have raised the dust

persian_text: سنگ باشد سخترو و چشمشوخ او نترسد از جهان پر کلوخ
english_translation: The rock is hardfaced and boldeyed it is not afraid of the world that is full of brickbats

persian_text: وآن جماعت جمله از جهل و عما در شکسته در امر شاه را
english_translation: And the whole company in their ignorance and blindness had broken the pearl of the Kings command

persian_text: قاصدا زیر آیم از اوج بلند تا شکسته پایگان بر من تنند
english_translation: Purposely I come down from the lofty zenith that those of base degree may attain to me

persian_text: جز که تسلیم و رضا کو چارهای در کف شیر نری خونخوارهای
english_translation: in the clutch of a fierce bloodthirsty lion where is any resource except resignation and acquiescence

persian_text: گفت حق آن سگ نیرزد هم به آن پیش سگ انداز از دور استخوان
english_translation: God said  That cur is not worth even that fling a bone to the cur from a distance

persian_text: نبود او را حسرت نقلان و موت لیک باشد حسرت تقصیر و فوت
english_translation: Feels grief on account of departure and death but grieves because of having failed and missed his opportunities

persian_text: همچنانک سهل شد ما را حضر سهل شد هم قوم دیگر را سفر
english_translation: Just as staying at home is easy to us so travelling is easy to another class of people

persian_text: زانک شیطانش بترساند ز فقر بارگیر صبر را بکشد به عقر
english_translation: Because the Devil frightens him away from poverty and kills the beast of burden patience by stabbing

persian_text: که نگنجیدم در افلاک و خلا در عقول و در نفوس با علا
english_translation: I am not contained in the heavens or in the void or in the exalted intelligences and souls

persian_text: تو بدین تزویر چون نوشی از آن چون حرامش کرد حق بر کافران
english_translation: Inasmuch as God hath made it unlawful to the unbelievers how wilt thou drink of it with this imposture

persian_text: وآن گنه در وی ز جنس جرم تست باید آن خو را ز طبع خویش شست
english_translation: And that sin in him is homogeneous with your sin you must wash that disposition out of your own nature

persian_text: تو بفرمودی که حق را یاد کن زانک حق من نمیگردد کهن
english_translation: Thou didst command saying Remember God because My right shall never grow old

persian_text: که صواب اینست و راه اینست و بس کی زند طعنه مرا جز هیچکس
english_translation: You said This is right and this is the only way how should any one but a nobody rail at me

persian_text: عاقبت دریافت او را و بدید گفت مژده ده که دستوری رسید
english_translation: At last he overtook and beheld him the giver of glad news said Permission has come

persian_text: مرگجو باشی ولی نه از عجز رنج بلک بینی در خراب خانه گنج
english_translation: Thou wilt be seeking death but not from painful infirmity nay thou wilt see the treasure in the ruin of the house

persian_text: پیش از آنک اشکنجه بیند زان قباد رقعه را آن شخص پیش او نهاد
english_translation: ere he should suffer the rack by order of the Emperor that person laid the note before him

persian_text: هست قاضی رحمت و دفع ستیز قطرهای از بحر عدل رستخیز
english_translation: The cadi is a mercy and the means of removing strife he is a drop from the ocean of the justice of the Resurrection

persian_text: پس بگو کو جنبش و جولانتان بحر افکندست در بحرانتان
english_translation: Then say  Where is your movement and gyration  The Sea has cast you into the crisis

persian_text: گفت پیغامبر که احمق هر که هست او عدو ماست و غول رهزنست
english_translation: The Prophet said Whosoever is foolish he is our enemy and a ghoul who waylays

persian_text: نکتهی لا ینبغی میخوان به جان سر من بعدی ز بخل او مدان
english_translation: Read with your soul the mystery of it behoves not do not deem the inward meaning of after me from his avarice

persian_text: این حکایت را بدان گفتم که تا لاف کم بافی چو رسوا شد خطا
english_translation: I have told this story with the intent that thou mayst not weave idle talk when the offence is glaring

persian_text: تخم نادر در فضیحت کاشتی در جهان تو مصحفی نگذاشتی
english_translation: Thou hast sown unique seed in infamy thou hast not left a single Scripture in the world

persian_text: هر خراج و صلتی که بایدت آن ز ما هر موسمی افزایدت
english_translation: Whatever thou requirest tribute or presents will come to thee from us with increase at every fixed time

persian_text: پادشاهی داشت یک برنا پسر باطن و ظاهر مزین از هنر
english_translation: A certain king had a young son adorned with excellence within and without

persian_text: کرامات ابراهیم ادهم بر لب دریا
english_translation: The miracles of Ibráhím son of Adham on the seashore

persian_text: چون دهان پر شد ز مرغ او ناگهان در کشدشان و فرو بندد دهان
english_translation: When its mouth is filled with birds it suddenly swallows them and closes its mouth

persian_text: در فلان حجره نشین تا نیمشب تا بیایم نیمشب من بی طلب
english_translation: Sit in such and such a room till midnight that at midnight I may come unsought

persian_text: مصطفی را بر زمین بنهاد او تا کند آن بانگ خوش را جست و جو
english_translation: She laid Mustafá on the earth that she might search after the sweet sound

persian_text: چند گاهی او بپوشاند که تا آیدت زان بد پشیمان و حیا
english_translation: For awhile He covers it up to the end that sorrow and shame for that evil may come to you

persian_text: گر مگس تاویل بگذارد به رای آن مگس را بخت گرداند همای
english_translation: If the fly leave off interpreting by opinion Fortune will turn that fly into a humáy

persian_text: عشق شش ساله کنیزک را بد اینکه بیابد خواجه را خلوت چنین
english_translation: For six years the maid had been longing to find the master alone like this

persian_text: میم و واو و میم و نون تشریف نیست لفظ مومن جز پی تعریف نیست
english_translation: mím and wáw and mím and nún do not confer honour the word múmin is only for the sake of denotation

persian_text: باد آن میوه فشاندی نه کسی پر شدی زان میوه دامنها بسی
english_translation: The breeze would scatter the fruit not any one by that fruit a multitude of skirts would be filled

persian_text: اینچنین رنجوریی پیدام شد جان من از رنج بیآرام شد
english_translation: such a sickness as this appeared in me through pain my soul was deprived of rest

persian_text: هر که جوید نام اگر صاحب ثقه است همچو تو نومید و اندر تفرقه است
english_translation: Whoever seeks the name if he is entrusted he is hopeless and in distraction even as thou art

persian_text: شرط تسلیم است نه کار دراز سود نبود در ضلالت ترکتاز
english_translation: What is required is selfsurrender not long toil tis useless to rush about in error

persian_text: چون تو باشی بخت خودای معنوی پس تو که بختی ز خود کی گم شوی
english_translation: When thou art thine own fortune O man of Reality then how wilt thou who art Fortune lose thyself

persian_text: باد و خاک و آب و آتش بندهاند با من و تو مرده با حق زندهاند
english_translation: Air and earth and water and fire are slaves with you and me they are dead but with God they are alive

persian_text: همچنین لب در ندانم باز کرد میندانم میندانم ساز کرد
english_translation: In this fashion he opened his lips to say I know not he made a tune of I know not I know not

persian_text: خایفان راه را کردی دلیر از همه لرزانتری تو زیر زیر
english_translation: You have emboldened those who are afraid of the Way underneath you are more tremulous than all

persian_text: اصلشان بد بود آن اهل سبا میرمیدندی ز اسباب لقا
english_translation: Their fundamental was bad those inhabitants of Sabá were recoiling from the means to meeting

persian_text: اشتری بد کو بدی حمال کوس بختیی بد پیشرو همچون خروس
english_translation: There was a camel that carried the kettledrum twas a Bactrian  going in front like a cock

persian_text: تند بادی همچو عزرائیل خاست موجها آشوفت اندر چپ و راست
english_translation: A fierce wind like Azráíl arose the waves tossed on left and right

persian_text: گفت پیغمبر علی را کای علی شیر حقی پهلوانی پر دلی
english_translation: The Prophet said to Alí O Alí thou art the Lion of God thou art a courageous knight

persian_text: روزهداران را بود آن نان و خوان خرمگس را چه ابا چه دیگدان
english_translation: The bread and dishes of food are for the fasters for the horsefly what difference is there between the soup and the trivet

persian_text: چون جهنم گریه آرد یاد آن پس جهنم خوشتر آید از جنان
english_translation: Since thinking of Hell causes weeping therefore Hell is better than Paradise

persian_text: زاریی میکن چو زورت نیست هین چون که کوری سر مکش از راه بین
english_translation: As you have no strength keep making a lamentation since you are blind take care do not turn your head away from him that sees the road

persian_text: معجبی یا خود قضامان در پی است ور نه این دم لایق چون تو کی است
english_translation: Thou art selfconceited or Destiny is pursuing us else how is this speech suitable to one like thee

persian_text: احمدا خود کیست اسپاه زمین ماه بین بر چرخ و بشکافش جبین
english_translation: O Ahmad  who indeed are the armies of the earth Behold the moon in heaven split her brow

persian_text: حیفش آمد که به زخمی جان دهد جان ز دست صدق او آسان رهد
english_translation: To him it was anguish that he should give up his soul at one blow and that his soul should escape lightly from the hand of his fortitude

persian_text: گر سیاهی بر شتر مشک آورد سوی میر خود به زودی میبرد
english_translation: For a negro on camelback will bring a waterskin he is conveying with all speed to his master

persian_text: هم از آنسو جو که وقت درد تو میشوی در ذکر یا ربی دوتو
english_translation: Seek from the same quarter to which in the hour of pain thou bendest low crying repeatedly O my Lord

persian_text: مردگان کهنه را جان میدهد تاج عقل و نور ایمان میدهد
english_translation: It gives life to the old dead  it gives the crown of reason and the light of faith

persian_text: او خورد از حرص طین را همچو دبس دنبه مسپارید ای یاران به خرس
english_translation: From greediness he eats clay as datesyrup O friends do not entrust the sheeps tail to the bear

persian_text: چون ز لقمه تو حسد بینی و دام جهل و غفلت زاید آن را دان حرام
english_translation: When from a morsel thou seest envy and guile ignorance and heedlessness are born  know that it is unlawful

persian_text: کین بخواند افسون به گوش او دمید مرده بود افسون به فریادش رسید
english_translation: For this recited charms and breathed into his ear he was dead the charms came to succour him

persian_text: جان تو کز بهر خویشم نیست این از برای تستم این ناله و حنین
english_translation: By thy soul this is not for my own sake this wailing and moaning of mine is on account of thee

persian_text: باز مرغی فوق دیواری نشست دیده سوی دانه دامی ببست
english_translation: Again a bird settles on a wall and fastens its eyes upon the grain in a trap

persian_text: بی ز جهدی آفریدی مر مرا بی فن من روزیم ده زین سرا
english_translation: Thou didst create me without any exertion  give me daily bread from this mansion without contrivance

persian_text: احولیها اندکاندک کم شود چون ز هفصد بگذرد او یم شود
english_translation: the squintnesses little by little grow less and when he passes beyond the seven hundred  he becomes the Sea

persian_text: تاجران انبیا کردند سود تاجران رنگ و بو کور و کبود
english_translation: Those who trade with the prophets have gained  those who trade with colour and scent are blind and blue

persian_text: هر کجا دو کس به مهری یا به کین جمع آید ثالثی زاید یقین
english_translation: Wherever two persons unite in a love or hate a third will certainly be born

persian_text: خیره شد در شیخ و اندر دلق او شکل دیگر گشته خلق و خلق او
english_translation: He was astounded at the Shaykh and at his dervish garb his nature and outward guise had become transformed

persian_text: تا بدین گرز گران کوبم سرش آن سر بیدانش مادرغرش
english_translation: That I may pound his head with this heavy clubhis ignorant whoreson head

persian_text: نک هلالی با بلالی یار شد زخم خار او را گل و گلزار شد
english_translation: Lo a new moon has been united with a Bilál the blows of the thorns have become to him roses and pomegranateflowers

persian_text: که بیا آخر بگو تفسیر این این زنان سه نوع گفتی بر گزین
english_translation: Come prithee declare the exposition of this Thou hast said that these women are of three kinds pick out

persian_text: چون که حق رش علیهم نوره مفترق هرگز نگردد نور او
english_translation: Inasmuch as God sprinkled His light upon them   His light never becomes separated

persian_text: چون عروسی خواست رفتن آن خریف موی ابرو پاک کرد آن مستخیف
english_translation: Since that autumn desired to be wed that lustful one plucked out the hair of her eyebrows Since that autumn desired to be wed that one desirous of a foreskin plucked out the hair of her eyebrows

persian_text: چشم آخر بین ببست از بهر حق چشم آخر بین گشاد اندر سبق
english_translation: He has shut for Gods sake the eye that sees the stable  he has openedin priority the eye that sees the end

persian_text: چون به خود آید نداند یک لغت چون پری را هست این ذات و صفت
english_translation: When he comes to himself he does not know a word  Inasmuch as a genie hath this essence and quality

persian_text: نه که عاشق روز و شب گوید سخن گاه با اطلال و گاهی با دمن
english_translation: Is it not the case that the lover day and night converses now with the ruins  now with the traces

persian_text: آفتاب گنبد ازرق شود کشتی هش چونک مستغرق شود
english_translation: The ship of consciousness when it is utterly wrecked becomes the sun in the blue vault

persian_text: گفت خصمان عالمند و علتی جاهلی تو لیک شمع ملتی
english_translation: He said The litigants know and are unsound  you are ignorant  but you are the luminary of the whole body

persian_text: جغد گفتا باز حیلت میکند تا ز خان و مان شما را بر کند
english_translation: The owl said The falcon is plotting to uproot you from house and home

persian_text: بانگ او تو نشنوی من بشنوم زانک در اسرار همراز ویم
english_translation: You do not hear his cry I hear it because I am his confidant in my inmost thoughts

persian_text: تو تمنا میبری که اختر مدام لاغ کردی سعد بودی بر دوام
english_translation: You wish that your star might always jest and your happiness continue for ever

persian_text: چون ندارم عقل تابان و صلاح پس چرا در چاه نندازم سلاح
english_translation: Since I do not possess a resplendent intellect and righteousness  why then should not I throw my weapons into the well

persian_text: دو قضیهی دیگر او را شرح داد لب به ذکر آن نخواهم بر گشاد
english_translation: He unfolded two other matters to him  I will not open my lips in mention of them

persian_text: بر زبان بیخ گل مهری نهد شاخ دست و پا گواهی میدهد
english_translation: The earth lays a seal on the roots tongue the bough its hand and foot is bearing witness

persian_text: نامناسب مینمود افعال او پیش موسی چون نبودش حال او
english_translation: His actions seemed unreasonable to Moses since he had not his state

persian_text: رستم ارچه با سر و سبلت بود دام پاگیرش یقین شهوت بود
english_translation: Though Rustam have head and moustache lust will certainly be the snare to catch his feet

persian_text: هفت چرخ ازرقی در رق اوست پیک ماه اندر تب و در دق اوست
english_translation: The seven blue spheres are in servitude to it the courier moon is fevered and wasted away by it

persian_text: پاک میدانستش از هر غش و غل باز از وهمش همیلرزید دل
english_translation: He knew him to be free from all deceitfulness and guile again his heart was shaken with misgiving

persian_text: تو تبرا کن که هستت دستگاهای تبرای ترا جان عذر خواه
english_translation: Be quit  for thou hast the power oh my soul pleads against thy making this declaration

persian_text: کاندر این زندان دنیا من خوشم تا که دشمن زادگان را میکشم
english_translation: For I am happy in the prison of this world in order that I may be slaying the children of mine enemy

persian_text: ای بدی که تو کنی در خشم و جنگ با طربتر از سماع و بانگ چنگ
english_translation: Oh the ill thou doest in wrath and quarrel is more delightful than music and the sound of the harp

persian_text: یک خلافی نی میان این عیون آنچنان که هست در علم ظنون
english_translation: Amongst these sources there is no dispute such as there is in knowledge based on opinions

persian_text: گفت این هر دو نیم از عامهام بنگر اندر حال و اندر جامهام
english_translation: He answered I am not these two I am of the common folk Look at my appearance and dress

persian_text: تا که روزی کین بمیرد ناگهان پیش چشم خود نهد او شمع جان
english_translation: In order that one day when this dies of a sudden he may place before his eye the candle of the spirit

persian_text: پیش ازین رمزی بگفتستیم ازین این و آن را تو یکی بین دو مبین
english_translation: We have previously given some indication of this  regard this and that as one not as two

persian_text: مرغ گفتش خواجه در خلوت مهایست دین احمد را ترهب نیک نیست
english_translation: The bird said to him O Khwája dont stay in seclusion monasticism is not good in regard to the religion of Ahmad

persian_text: شاه چون از محو شد سوی وجود چشم مریخیش آن خون کرده بود
english_translation: When the King emerged from the state of selfeffacement into consciousness his martial eye had wrought that bloodshed

persian_text: گفت اینجا حاضری اما ولیک من نمییایم نصیب خویش نیک
english_translation: He replied Thou art present here but I am not gaining my pleasure well

persian_text: روز دیگر از پگه صدیق تفت آن طرف از بهر کاری میبرفت
english_translation: Early next day the Siddíq was going quickly in that district on account of some affair

persian_text: تلخی هجر از ذکور و از اناث دور دارای مجرمان را مستغاث
english_translation: Keep the bitterness of banishment aloof from males and females O thou whose help is besought by sinners

persian_text: خلق پندارند زر دارم درون داد واگیرند از من زین ظنون
english_translation: People think I keep gold in it and because of these opinions charity is withheld from me

persian_text: بحر شه که مرجع هر آب اوست چون نداند آنچ اندر سیل و جوست
english_translation: How  should the sea of the King to which every water returns be ignorant of what is in torrent and river

persian_text: گر نجس شد آب این طبعش بماند که آتش غم را به طبع خود نشاند
english_translation: If the water has been defiled this natural property of it remains for by its nature it allays the fire of grief

persian_text: کسمان را منتظر میداشتی تخم فردا ره روم میکاشتی
english_translation: Because you were wont to keep Heaven waiting and sow the seed of I will go on the Way tomorrow

persian_text: یا به طفل شیر مادر بانگ زد که بیا من مادرم هانای ولد
english_translation: Or a mother cries to her suckling babe Come I am mother hark my child

persian_text: اندر آ مادر که اقبال آمده ست اندر آ مادر مده دولت ز دست
english_translation: Come in mother for felicity is come come in mother do not let fortune slip from thy hand

persian_text: آن همه حبر و قلم فانی شود وین حدیث بیعدد باقی بود
english_translation: All that ink and pens pass away and this numberless Word is everlasting

persian_text: زانک کان و مخزن صنع خدا نیست غیر نیستی در انجلا
english_translation: Because the mine and treasury of Gods doing is not other than nonexistence in being brought into manifestation

persian_text: تا درو باشد زبانی میزند تا به دانش از دهان بیرون کند
english_translation: So long as it is there he keeps moving his tongue in order that thereby he may eject it from his mouth

persian_text: این همیگفتش بتسخر رو بگیر که رسیدت روزی و آمد بشیر
english_translation: This one would say to him derisively Go and receive  for your daily portion has arrived and the messenger has come with the good news

persian_text: لیک نفس نحس و آن شیطان زشت میکشندت سوی کفران و کنشت
english_translation: But thy illomened carnal soul and the wicked Devil are dragging thee towards infidelity and the firetemple

persian_text: بود بازرگانی او را طوطیی در قفس محبوس زیبا طوطیی
english_translation: There was a merchant and he had a parrot imprisoned in a cage a pretty parrot

persian_text: بل زر مضروب ضرب ایزدی کو نگردد کاسد آمد سرمدی
english_translation: Nay the gold stamped with the Divine stamp which does not become obsolete is everlasting

persian_text: گر در آن آدم بکردی مشورت در پشیمانی نگفتی معذرت
english_translation: If Adam had taken counsel in that  he would not have uttered excuses in penitence

persian_text: بس درازست این حکایت تو ملول زبده را گویم رها کردم فضول
english_translation: This story is very long and you are weary I will relate the cream  I dismiss what is superfluous

persian_text: دانهی دامش چنین مستی نمود خوان انعامش چهها داند گشود
english_translation: The bait in His snare produced intoxication like this what things  can the table of His bounty reveal

persian_text: جرم آنک زیور عاریه بست کرد دعوی کین حلل ملک منست
english_translation: The crime is that he put on a borrowed adornment and pretended that these robes were his own property

persian_text: هرچه زیر چرخ هستند امهات از جماد و از بهیمه وز نبات
english_translation: Whatever mothers there are under the skymineral animal or vegetable

persian_text: آنک بیند این علامتها پدید چون نداند او شقی را از سعید
english_translation: He who sees these signs clearly how should not he know the damned from the blest

persian_text: اندر آیید ای مسلمانان همه غیر عذب دین عذاب است آن همه
english_translation: O true believers come in all of you except the sweetness of religion all is torment

persian_text: این گریزد از دلیل و از حجاب از پی مدلول سر برده به جیب
english_translation: The latter flees from the proof and from the veil  he has sunk his head in his bosom for the sake of the Object of the proof

persian_text: که ز لطف یار تلخیهای مات گشت بر جان خوشتر از شکرنبات
english_translation: that by grace of the Beloved the bitternesses of death were made sweeter than sugarcane to the soul

persian_text: حرص مردان از ره پیشی بود در مخنث حرص سوی پس رود
english_translation: The greed of men is by the forward way greed in the effeminate goes backward

persian_text: حکایت در تقریر این سخن کی چندین گاه گفت و گو را آزمودیم
english_translation: Story in confirmation of the saying We have tried speech and talk all this time for a while

persian_text: جواب گفتن خرگوش نخجیران را
english_translation: How the hare answered the beasts

persian_text: حمیتی بد جاهلیت در دماغ بانگ شومی بر دمنشان کرد زاغ
english_translation: A heathen pride was in their brains the raven croaked disaster over the traces of their habitation

persian_text: نفس از باطن مرا آواز داد که به گوش حس شنیدم بامداد
english_translation: My fleshly soul cried out to me from within at morningtide I heard with my sensuous ear

persian_text: آن فقیری بهر پیچا پیچ نیست بل پی آنکه بجز حق هیچ نیست
english_translation: That dervishhood is not for the sake of entanglement  no because nothing exists but God

persian_text: کی ازین جا بوی خلد آید ترا بو ز موضع جو اگر باید ترا
english_translation: How should the scent of Paradise come to thee from this place If thou requirest the scent seek it from its place

persian_text: پس زر و گوهر ز معدنهای خوش کرد آن پسمانده را حق پیشکش
english_translation: Then God offered to that fallen one gold and jewels from His goodly mines

persian_text: پس عماد الملک گفتش ای خدیو چون فرشته گردد از میل تو دیو
english_translation: Thereupon the Imádu lMulk said to him O emperor a demon is made angelic by thy inclination

persian_text: خاله را خایه بدی خالو شدی این به تقدیر آمدست ار او بدی
english_translation: Materterae si testiculi essent ea avunculus esset this is hypotheticalif there were  in regard to a maternal aunt there were testicles she would would be a maternal uncle this is hypotheticalif there were

persian_text: ز اختلاف خویش سوی اتحاد هین ز هر جانب روان گردید شاد
english_translation: Hark from every quarter set out with joy from your diversity towards oneness

persian_text: گفت ای سگ صوفیی باشد که تیز اندر آیی باغ ما تو از ستیز
english_translation: O dog he cried is it Súfism that of a sudden you come into my orchard in spite

persian_text: عیسی قادر بود کو از یک دعا بی توقف بر جهاند مرده را
english_translation: Jesus by means of one prayer was able to make the dead spring up without delay

persian_text: لیک از ایمان و صدق بایزید چند حسرت در دل و جانم رسید
english_translation: But many a regret has come into my heart and soul from the Faith and sincerity of Báyazíd

persian_text: چون شما این نفس دوزخ خوی را آتشی گبر فتنه جوی را
english_translation: Inasmuch as with this soul of hellish nature miscreant fiery one that seeks temptation

persian_text: خواه بین نور از چراغ آخرین خواه بین نورش ز شمع غابرین
english_translation: Either behold the light from the lamp of the last  or behold His light from the candle of those who have gone before

persian_text: خود نبودست و مبادا اینچنین که زمین گردون شود گردون زمین
english_translation: Truly never has there beenand never may there besuch a thing as this that the earth should become the sky and the sky become the earth

persian_text: سجده کرد و گفت کاین گاو سمین چاشت خوردت باشد ای شاه گزین
english_translation: He bowed low and said This fat ox will be thy food at breakfast O excellent King

persian_text: دید او آن غنج و برجست سبک چون تجلی حق از پردهی تنک
english_translation: He deemed that coquetry and light springing gait to be like the revelation of Divine glory through a thin veil

persian_text: برق خندد بر که میخندد بگو بر کسی که دل نهد بر نور او
english_translation: The lightning laughs say at whom is it laughing At him that sets his heart upon its light

persian_text: چشم او تاریک گردد در زمانبر جهد سرمست زین که تا بدان
english_translation: Straightway his eye is darkened he leaps madly from this mountain to that

persian_text: آنچنان که عارف از راه نهان خوش نشسته میرود در صد جهان
english_translation: As the gnostic sitting quietly  travels by a hidden track through a hundred worlds

persian_text: نردبانهاییست پنهان در جهان پایه پایه تا عنان آسمان
english_translation: In the world there are invisible ladders step by step up to the summit of heaven

persian_text: نیم جان بستاند و صد جان دهد آن چه در وهمت نیاید آن دهد
english_translation: He takes half a life and gives a hundred lives  he gives that which enters not into your imagination

persian_text: گاو و خر را فایده چه در شکر هست هر جان را یکی قوتی دگر
english_translation: What profit have the ox and the ass in sugar Every soul has a different food

persian_text: غیر این عقل تو حق را عقلهاست که بدان تدبیر اسباب سماست
english_translation: To God belong intelligences other than this intelligence of yours by which the mediate celestial things are ruled

persian_text: همچنانک این جهان پیش نبی غرق تسبیحست و پیش ما غبی
english_translation: Just as to the Prophet this world is plunged in glorification of God while to us it is heedless

persian_text: ذکر آن پادشاه که آن دانشمند را به اکراه در مجلس آورد
english_translation: Anecdote of a king who brought a learned doctor into his banquethall by force

persian_text: قصهی آغاز خلافت عثمان رضی الله عنه و خطبهی وی در بیان آنک ناصح فعال به فعل به از ناصح قوال
english_translation: Story of the beginning of the Caliphate of Uthmán may God be wellpleased with him and his sermon expounding that the doer who exhorts by deeds is better than the speaker who exhorts by words

persian_text: گفت من از خودنمایی نامدم جز به خواری و گدایی نامدم
english_translation: he said I do not come from selfadvertisement I come not save in humility and beggary

persian_text: تو ز اولاد زنایی بیگمان تیر کژ پرد چو بد باشد کمان
english_translation: Thou art one of the children of adultery without doubt the arrow flies crookedly when the bow is bad

persian_text: گر بتازی گوید او ور پارسی گوش و هوشی کو که در فهمش رسی
english_translation: Whether he speak Arabic or Persian where is the ear and mind by means of which you should attain to the apprehension of it

persian_text: چند بارش راند از روی جوان آن مگس زو باز میآمد دوان
english_translation: Several times he drove them from the youths face but soon they came hurrying back once more

persian_text: لاجرم محجوب گشتند از غرض که دقیقه فوت شد در معترض
english_translation: Necessarily they were debarred from the object for the subtlety escaped on the occasion when it presented itself

persian_text: من ترا افسوس میکردم ز جهل من بدم افسوس را منسوب و اهل
english_translation: In my folly I was ridiculing thee I myself was related to ridicule and deserving it

persian_text: مر شما را بس نیامد رای من ظنتان این است در اعطای من
english_translation: Was my judgement not enough for you Is this your opinion of my bounty

persian_text: هر که باشد شاه دردش را دواگر چو نی نالد نباشد بینوا
english_translation: Any one for whose pain the King is the remedythough he wail like the reed  he is not without plenty

persian_text: تا که روزی ناگهان در چاشتگاه این دعا میکرد با زاری و آه
english_translation: Until suddenly one day he was uttering this prayer with moaning and sighs at morningtide

persian_text: ورنه اندر من رسیدی شیر نر چون بدی در زیر پنجهی شیر خر
english_translation: Else the fierce lion would have overtaken me how would an ass have fared in the grip of a lion

persian_text: زانک بیخواه تو خود کفر تو نیست کفر بیخواهش تناقض گفتنیست
english_translation: For without your will your unbelief does not exist at all involuntary unbelief is a selfcontradiction

persian_text: نیست در تقدیر ما آنک تو این مسجد اقصی بر آریای گزین
english_translation: Tis not in Our foreordainment that thou shouldst raise this Farther Mosque O chosen one

persian_text: رب هب لی از سلیمان آمده ست که مده غیر مرا این ملک و دست
english_translation: From Solomon have come the words O Lord give me  that is do not give this kingdom and power to any but me

persian_text: لیک آن کاول وزیر شه بده ست محتسب کردن سبب فعل بد است
english_translation: But he that was first the kings vizierevildoing is the cause of making him a police inspector

persian_text: تا غذای اصل را قابل شوی لقمههای نور را آکل شوی
english_translation: So that you may become capable of the original nutriment and may eat habitually the dainty morsels of the light

persian_text: حرص بط از شهوت حلقست و فرج در ریاست بیست چندانست درج
english_translation: The ducks greed arises from the appetite of the gullet and pudendum twenty times as much is included in rule

persian_text: گردن خر گیر و سوی راه کش سوی رهبانان و ره دانان خوش
english_translation: Seize the neck of your ass and lead him towards the Way towards the good keepers and knowers of the Way

persian_text: گرنه نفس از اندرون راهت زدی رهزنان را بر تو دستی کی بدی
english_translation: If the fleshly soul had not waylaid you from within how would the brigands have any power to lay a hand upon you

persian_text: تو اگر انگشتری را بردهای دوزخی چون زمهریر افسردهای
english_translation: If thou hast carried off the signetring thou art a Hell frozen like piercing cold

persian_text: میشتابیدند تفت از حرص زر عقلشان میگفت نه آهستهتر
english_translation: In greed of gold they were hastening rapidly  their reason was saying No not so fast

persian_text: هر که جز آگاه و صاحب ذوق بود گفت او در گردن او طوق بود
english_translation: any who was not wary and possessed of discernment the words of him were a collar on his neck

persian_text: قلب چون آمد سیه شد در زمان زر در آمد شد زری او عیان
english_translation: When the alloy came  it became black at once the gold came in its goldenness was made manifest

persian_text: هر یکی را مخزنی مفتاح آنای برادر در کف فتاح دان
english_translation: Each one has a storehouse know O brother that the key thereof is in the hand of the Opener

persian_text: باز کن آن را به دست خود بمال آنگهان خواهی ببر کردم حلال
english_translation: Undo it and rub with your hand then take it if you like I sanction

persian_text: روز دیدی طلعت خورشید خوب مرگ او را یاد کن وقت غروب
english_translation: In the daytime thou didst deem the countenance of the sun beauteous remember its death in the moment of setting

persian_text: چون حدیث روی شمسالدین رسید شمس چارم آسمان سر در کشید
english_translation: When news arrived of the face of Shamsuddín  the sun of the fourth heaven drew in its head

persian_text: چون همی کرد از عدم گردون پدید وین بساط خاک را میگسترید
english_translation: Since He was producing the sky from nonexistence and spreading this carpet of earth

persian_text: پس حواس چیره محکوم تو شد چون خرد سالار و مخدوم تو شد
english_translation: So when the intellect becomes thy captain and master the dominant senses become subject to thee

persian_text: چون به ره کردش بگفت ای تیز بین تو فقیهی ظاهر است این و یقین
english_translation: Having sent him off he said  O keensighted one thou art a jurist this is manifest and sure

persian_text: مثل عرب إذا زنیت فازن بالحرة و إذا سرقت فاسرق الدرة
english_translation: The Arabic proverb If you commit fornication commit it with a free woman and if you steal steal a pearl

persian_text: او ز صیادان به که بگریخته خود پناهش خون او را ریخته
english_translation: He had fled to the mountain from the hunters his very refuge shed his blood

persian_text: بندگی او به از سلطانیست که انا خیر دم شیطانیست
english_translation: To be His slave is better than being a sovereign for I am better is the word of Satan

persian_text: پای در دریا منه کم گوی از آن بر لب دریا خمش کن لب گزان
english_translation: Do not set foot in the Sea speak not of It on the shore of the Sea keep silence biting your lips

persian_text: حق ز هر جنسی چو زوجین آفرید پس نتایج شد ز جمعیت پدید
english_translation: Since God created pairs of every kind therefore results are produced by means of union

persian_text: تو که یک جزوی دلا زین صدهزار چون نباشی پیش حکمش بیقرار
english_translation: How shouldst thou O heart which art one of these hundred thousand particulars not be in restless movement at His decree

persian_text: سنگ بیجرمست در معبودیش تو نهای مضطر که بنده بودیش
english_translation: The stone is guiltless in respect of being an object of worship you are not under compulsion in worshipping it

persian_text: گفت نه بادی که جست از فرج وی میشناسم همچنانک آبی ز می
english_translation: Nay he said I know the wind that escaped from its arse as well as water from wine

persian_text: هر چه اندیشی و تحصیلی کنی میدرآید دزد از آنسو کایمنی
english_translation: Whatsoever acquisition you may make O solicitous one the thief will enter from the side where you feel safe

persian_text: رویها باشد که دیوان چون مگس بر سرش بنشسته باشند چون حرس
english_translation: There are faces on which demons are settled like gnats as guardsmen

persian_text: جرعهای بر خاک تیره ریختند زان چهار و فتنهای انگیختند
english_translation: From those four a draught has been poured on the dark Earth and a temptation has been offered

persian_text: نه ز غفلت بود ماندن نه خری بلک بود از اضطرار و بیخری
english_translation: Their remaining was not from heedlessness or asininity nay it was from necessity and want of an ass

persian_text: زان همی تانی بدادن تن به کار که بپوشید از تو عیبش کردگار
english_translation: Thou art able to give thyself up to the work because the Creator veils its faultiness from thee

persian_text: هر کسی پیش کلوخی جامهچاک که آن کلوخ از حسن آمد جرعهناک
english_translation: Every one is tattered in the presence of a clod that has received a draught of Beauty

persian_text: انبیا را داد حق تنجیم این غیب را چشمی بباید غیببین
english_translation: God bestowed this astronomy on the prophets for the Unseen an eye that observes the Unseen is necessary

persian_text: این دل سرگشته را تدبیر بخش وین کمانهای دوتو را تیر بخش
english_translation: bestow forethought on this bewildered heart and bestow the arrow on these bows bent double

persian_text: تا گره بندیم و بگشاییم ما در شکال و در جواب آیین فزا
english_translation: And to the end that we may tie knots and undo them making many rules for the difficulty and for answering

persian_text: مکرر کردن کافران حجتهای جبریانه را
english_translation: How the infidels repeated the Necessitarian arguments

persian_text: زانک ملت فضل جوید یا خلاص پاک بازانند قربانان خاص
english_translation: Forasmuch as religion seeks grace or salvation those who gamble clean away are chosen favourites

persian_text: از نظرگاهست ای مغز وجود اختلاف مومن و گبر و جهود
english_translation: From the place of view O kernel of Existence there arises the difference between the true believer and the Zoroastrian and the Jew

persian_text: این بگفت و دست خود آن مژدهور بر دل او زد که رو زحمت ببر
english_translation: The announcer of the good news said this and put his hand on his heart saying Go endure the toil

persian_text: ایستاده پیش یزدان اشکریز بر مثال راستخیز رستخیز
english_translation: Standing in Gods presence and shedding tears like one who rises erect on rising from the dead

persian_text: هر نفس مکری و در هر مکر ز آن غرقه صد فرعون با فرعونیان
english_translation: Every moment an act of deceit and in every one of those deceits a hundred Pharaohs are drowned together with their followers

persian_text: بشنو این قصه پی تهدید را تا بدانی آفت تقلید را
english_translation: Hear this story as a deterrent in order that you may know the banefulness of blind imitation

persian_text: تا رسیدن در شه و در ناز خوش رازیا با مرغزی میساز خویش
english_translation: Till coming to the king and to sweet delight O man of Rayy be on good terms with the man of Merv

persian_text: تا که این ترکیبها را بر درد مرغ هر جزوی به اصل خود پرد
english_translation: In order that it may rend these coalitions asunder each part like a bird may fly to its home

persian_text: چونک قدرت رفت کاسد شد عمل هین که تا سرمایه نستاند اجل
english_translation: When the power is gone the work becomes unsaleable  Take heed lest Doom seize the capital

persian_text: چون همیگیرد گواه سر لگام خاصه وقت جوش و خشم و انتقام
english_translation: And since the witness to the secret thought seizes the reinsin particular at times of emotion and anger and revenge

persian_text: عاقل و مجنون حقم یاد آر در چنین بیخویشیم معذور دار
english_translation: I am sane and maddened by God remember  and in such a state of selflessness hold me excusable

persian_text: قسم هر روزش بیاید بیجگر حاجتش نبود تقاضای دگر
english_translation: the daily ration should come to him without trouble and that he should not need to make a further demand

persian_text: گر بود در راه آب این را بریز ور نباشد وای بر مرد ستیز
english_translation: If there be water  spill this  and if there be none alas for the obstinate man

persian_text: وز نباتی چون به حیوانی فتاد نامدش حال نباتی هیچ یاد
english_translation: And when he passed from the vegetable into the animal state the vegetable state was not remembered by him at all

persian_text: هم نکر سازید از بهر ثمود صیحهای که جانشان را در ربود
english_translation: Moreover He appointed a servant for Thamúd  the Cry that took away their lives

persian_text: همت سیر تنش چون این بود سیر جانش تا به علیین بود
english_translation: Since the aspiration on his journey in the body is this his journey in the spirit must be unto the highestParadise

persian_text: دیدبان دل نبیند در مجال کز کدامین رکن جان آید خیال
english_translation: The sentry of the heart while on his round does not see from what corner of the soul the fancy comes

persian_text: سیصد و نه سال آن اصحاب کهف پیششان یک روز بی اندوه و لهف
english_translation: The three hundred and nine years of the Men of the Cave seemed to them one day without grief and woe

persian_text: تختهی مردهکشان بفراشتند وان ابوبکر مرا برداشتند
english_translation: They raised the corpsebearers board and lifted our Abú Bakr

persian_text: چون نبودش صبر میپیچید او کاین سگ زن روسپی حیز کو
english_translation: Since he had no patience he was tormented Where he cried is this cur this infamous cuckold

persian_text: همچو هندوبچه هینای خواجهتاش رو ز محمود عدم ترسان مباش
english_translation: Hark O fellowservant go and like the Hindú boy be not afraid of the Mahmúd of nonexistence

persian_text: دست و پا مریخ چندین خست ازو وآن عطارد صد قلم بشکست ازو
english_translation: On account of it Mars has inflicted so many wounds on his hands and feet and on account of it Mercury has broken a hundred pens

persian_text: بی زرهبافی و رنجی روزیش مینیاید با همه پیروزیش
english_translation: Without weaving coats of mail and some trouble  his livelihood is not coming  notwithstanding all his victoriousness

persian_text: بینی طفلی بمالد مادری تا شود بیدار واجوید خوری
english_translation: A mother rubs the nose of her babe that it may wake and seek some food

persian_text: مسجدست آن دل که جسمش ساجدست یار بد خروب هر جا مسجدست
english_translation: The mosque is the heart to which the body bows down wherever the mosque is the bad companion is the carob

persian_text: ز انکه حشر حاسدان روز گزند بیگمان بر صورت گرگان کنند
english_translation: Because on the Day of Bale the envious will without doubt be brought together in the shape of wolves

persian_text: یا رسولالله درین لشکر نگر هست چندین پیر و از وی پیشتر
english_translation: O Messenger of God look on this army there are so many elders and superior to him

persian_text: ما بعکس آن ز غیر حق خبیر بیخبر از حق و از چندین نذیر
english_translation: Contrariwise we are aware of other than God unaware of God and of so many warners

persian_text: کی فروزد لاله را رخ همچو خون کی گل از کیسه بر آرد زر برون
english_translation: How shall the cheeks of the anemone flame like blood How shall the rose bring gold out of its purse

persian_text: از چه گریی دولتت شد ناگوار فوق املاکی قرین شهریار
english_translation: Wherefore shouldst thou weep Has thy fortune become disagreeable to thee Thou art above kings the familiar companion of the Emperor

persian_text: اینچنین فکر دقیق و رای خوب تو چنین عریان پیاده در لغوب
english_translation: Such subtle thought and excellent judgement And you so naked on foot and in fatigue

persian_text: تا چه مستیها بود املاک را وز جلالت روحهای پاک را
english_translation: So that what intoxications befall the angels and the spirits purified by the Divine glory

persian_text: شه نوازیدش که هستی یادگار کرد او را هم بدان پرسش شکار
english_translation: The King greeted him affectionately saying Thou art a keepsake  and by this enquiry made him too his prey

persian_text: آنچنان که در تن مردان زنان خفیهاند و ماده از ضعف جنان
english_translation: Similarly women are concealed in mens bodies and they are female because of faintness of heart

persian_text: بهر آن لطفی که حقت بر گزید کرد بر تو علم لوح کل پدید
english_translation: for the sake of the favour by which God chose thee out and revealed to thee the knowledge in the Universal Tablet

persian_text: در میان جانشان بود آن سمی لک قاصد کرده خود را اعجمی
english_translation: That exalted was in the midst of their souls but he had purposely feigned to be unfamiliar

persian_text: حکایت آن امیر کی غلام را گفت کی می بیار
english_translation: Story of the Amír who bade his slave fetch some wine

persian_text: او زبون شد جرم این کرباس چیست آنک او مغلوب غالب نیست کیست
english_translation: he is reduced to submission what is the crime of this linen Who is he that is not dominated by the predominant

persian_text: وآن نظرهایی که آن افسرده نیست جز رونده و جز درندهی پرده نیست
english_translation: But those insights that are not frozen are nothing if not piercing and veilrending

persian_text: خجل گشتن خروس پیش سگ به سبب دروغ شدن در آن سه وعده
english_translation: How the cock became abashed before the dog on account of being false in those three promises

persian_text: غرقهی نوری که او لم یولدست لم یلد لم یولد آن ایزدست
english_translation: Plunged in the Light which is unbegotten He neither begetteth nor is He begotten belongs to God

persian_text: از نبی بشنو که شیطان در وعید میکند تهدیدت از فقر شدید
english_translation: Hear from the Qurán that the Devil in menace is threatening thee with hard poverty

persian_text: چون بگردانید ناگه پوستین خردشان بشکست آن بس القرین
english_translation: When of a sudden it turned its coat that evil comrade shattered them piecemeal

persian_text: که مرا پیش حشر خواری کنی روز روشن بر دلم تاری کنی
english_translation: That thou shouldst treat me with contumely in the presence of the assembled people and make the bright day dark to my heart

persian_text: ور بچه گیرد ازو شهناز او دیو در نسلش بود انباز او
english_translation: And if his Shahnáz be got with child by him the Devil is his partner in begetting it

persian_text: تنگ گرداند جهان چاره را آب گرداند حدید و خاره را
english_translation: It makes the world of contrivance to be straitened it makes iron and hard rock to be water

persian_text: ای بسا حمال گشته پشتریش از برای دلبر مهروی خویش
english_translation: Oh many a porter his back torn with wounds for the sake of the moonfaced one to whom he has lost his heart

persian_text: چون خدا خواهد که پوشد عیب کس کم زند در عیب معیوبان نفس
english_translation: And if God wishes to hide the blame of any one he does not breathe a word of blame against the blameworthy

persian_text: مال و تن در راه حج دوردست خوش همیبازند چون عشاق مست
english_translation: And like intoxicated lovers gladly risking their property and lives on their way to the distant Pilgrimage

persian_text: آزمودم من هزاران بار بیش بی تو شیرین مینبینم عیش خویش
english_translation: I have put it to the test more than a thousand times I don not deem my life sweet without thee

persian_text: گاو آبی گوهر از بحر آورد بنهد اندر مرج و گردش میچرد
english_translation: The watercow fetches a pearl out of the sea lays it on the meadow and grazes around it

persian_text: عاجزی و خیره کن عجز از کجاست عجز تو تابی از آن روز جزاست
english_translation: Thou art helpless and unable to understand the cause of this helplessness thy helplessness is a reflexion of the Day of Retribution

persian_text: حال رفت و ماند جزوت یادگار یا ازو واپرس یا خود یاد آر
english_translation: The ecstasy is gone but thy part remains as a souvenir either inquire of it or thyself recall to mind

persian_text: جز خیالی عارضی باطلی کو بود چون صبح کاذب آفلی
english_translation: Except an unsubstantial and vain phantasy which is one that sinks like the false dawn

persian_text: متصل نه منفصل نهای کمال بلک بی چون و چگونه و اعتلال
english_translation: Not united not separated O Perfection nay devoid of quality or description or causation

persian_text: گفت تدبیر آن بود کان مرد را حاضر آریم از پی این درد را
english_translation: The plan said he is that we should bring the man here for the sake of this malady

persian_text: چون که موسی این عتاب از حق شنید در بیابان در پی چوپان دوید
english_translation: When Moses heard these reproaches from God he ran into the desert in quest of the shepherd

persian_text: ای دریغا عرصهی افهام خلق سخت تنگ آمد ندارد خلق حلق
english_translation: Oh alas the area of the peoples understandings is exceeding narrow the people have no throat

persian_text: بیشتر زان ملک که اکنون داشتی کان بد اندر جنگ و این در آشتی
english_translation: Greater than the empire of which thou art now in possession for that was at war  and this at peace

persian_text: گر بیان نطق کاذب نیز هست لیک بوی از صدق و کذبش مخبرست
english_translation: Even if the oral explanation is false yet the scent makes one acquainted with his veracity or falsehood

persian_text: عاشق عشق خدا وانگاه مزد جبرئیل متمن وانگاه دزد
english_translation: in love with Gods love and then a wage a trusted Gabriel and then a thief

persian_text: آن یکی کورم ز کوران بشمرید او نیاز جان و اخلاصم ندید
english_translation: That blind fellow has reckoned me amongst the blind he has not seen my souls humble supplication and my entire devotion

persian_text: این زمین از حلم حق دارد اثر تا نجاست برد و گلها داد بر
english_translation: This earth has the mark of Gods clemency in that it got filth and gave flowers as the produce

persian_text: قرنها را صورت سنگین بسوخت آتشی در دین و دلشان بر فروخت
english_translation: a stone image consumed the generations and kindled a fire in their religion and their hearts

persian_text: یار ناخوش پر و بالش بسته بود ورنه او در اصل بس برجسته بود
english_translation: Its disagreeable companion had tied its wings and plumes else originally it was very soaring

persian_text: چون سبب معلوم نبود مشکلست داروی رنج و در آن صد محملست
english_translation: When the cause is unknown the remedy for the illness is difficult  and in that there are a hundred grounds to which it may be referred

persian_text: غولهای را که بر آرایید غول پخته پندارد کسی که هست گول
english_translation: one who is foolish will think ripe the ghawla which the ghouls deck out

persian_text: گفت آن درویش یا رب با تو من عهد کردم زین نچینم در زمن
english_translation: The dervish said O Lord I make a covenant with Thee I will not pluck any of these during the time

persian_text: نک منم ینبوع آن آب حیات تا رهانم عاشقان را از ممات
english_translation: Lo I am the Fountain of the Water of Life that I may deliver the lovers from death

persian_text: علم جویای یقین باشد بدان و آن یقین جویای دیدست و عیان
english_translation: Know that knowledge is a seeker of certainty and certainty is a seeker of vision and intuition

persian_text: زنده نی تا همدم عیسی بود مرده نی تا دمگه عیسی شود
english_translation: He is not living that he should breathe in accord with Jesus nor is he dead that he should become a channel for the breath of Jesus

persian_text: خواب میبینند و آنجا خواب نه در عدم در میروند و باب نه
english_translation: They dream and no sleep is there they go into nonexistence and no door

persian_text: چون شکوفه ریخت میوه سر کند چون که تن بشکست جان سر بر زند
english_translation: When the blossom is shed the fruit comes to a head when the body is shattered the spirit lifts up its head

persian_text: پردهدار تو درت را بر کند جان تو با تو به جان خصمی کند
english_translation: Thy chamberlain will destroy thy door thy soul with its soul will act as an enemy towards thee

persian_text: فرخ آن ترکی که استیزه نهد اسپش اندر خندق آتش جهد
english_translation: Blest is the Turcoman who lays contention aside and whose horse gallops into the moat of fire

persian_text: مثلها زدن قوم نوح باستهزا در زمان کشتی ساختن
english_translation: How the people of Noah uttered similitudes derisively at the time of his building the Ark

persian_text: جوع خود سلطان داروهاست هین جوع در جان نه چنین خوارش مبین
english_translation: Indeed hunger is the king of medicines hark lay hunger to thy heart do not regard it with such contempt

persian_text: من نیم در عهد ایمان بتپرست بت بر آن بتپرست اولیترست
english_translation: I am not an idolater in the epoch of the true Faith tis more fit that the idol should be in the hands of the idolater

persian_text: چونک بر میخت ببندد بسته باش چونک بگشاید برو بر جسته باش
english_translation: When He fastens thee to a peg be fastened  when He looses thee go be exultant

persian_text: جز برای یاری و تعلیم غیر سرد باشد راه خیر از بعد خیر
english_translation: After felicity the way to felicity is worthless except for the sake of helping and teaching others

persian_text: چون مقرر شد بزرگی رسول پس حسد ناید کسی را از قبول
english_translation: as the grandeur of the Prophet has become established none feels envy  since he is accepted

persian_text: گفت زن آهنگ برم میکنی یا به حیلت کشف سرم میکنی
english_translation: The wife said Dost thou intend to treat me with kindness or art thou discovering my secret by trickery

persian_text: گفت قاضیای صنم معمول چیست گفت خانهی این کنیزک بس تهیست
english_translation: O adorable one said the cadi what can be contrived She answered This handmaids house is quite empty

persian_text: عزت وحشی بدین افتاد پست که مر انسان را مخالف آمده ست
english_translation: The honour of the wild animals is fallen low because they have grown hostile to man

persian_text: هر چه گوید مرد عاشق بوی عشق از دهانش میجهد در کوی عشق
english_translation: Whatsoever the man in love speaks the scent of Love is springing from his mouth into the abode of Love

persian_text: ترک خواب غفلت خرگوش کن غرهی این شیرای خر گوش کن
english_translation: Abandon the hares sleep of heedlessness Give ear O donkey to the roaring of this lion

persian_text: خاصه مرغی مردهای پوسیدهای پر خیالی اعمیی بیدیدهای
english_translation: Especially a bird that is dead putrid a blind eyeless filled with vain fancy

persian_text: تا قیامت هر که جنس آن بدان در وجود آید بود رویش بدان
english_translation: Until the Resurrection the face of every congener of those wicked men who comes into existence is turned towards that one

persian_text: مار بودی اژدها گشتی مگر یک سرت بود این زمانی هفتسر
english_translation: thou wert a snake indeed thou hast become a dragon Thou hadst one head now thou hast seven heads

persian_text: در گشادن حیله کرد آن حیلهساز نوع نوع و خود نشد آن بند باز
english_translation: The cunning man employed various devices to open it but the fastening did not give way

persian_text: جانب دکان وراق آمد او دست میبرد او به مشقش سو به سو
english_translation: he came to the stationers shop and was laying his hand here and there on his models for writing

persian_text: تا به پشت آدم اسلافش همه مهتران بزم و رزم و ملحمه
english_translation: All his ancestors to the loins of Adam lords in feast and fray and the carnage of battle

persian_text: دستمزدی مینخواهیم از کسی دستمزد ما رسد از حق بسی
english_translation: We do not desire a fee from any one our fee comes many a time from God

persian_text: وای کز آواز این بیست و چهار کاروان بگذشت و بیگه شد نهار
english_translation: Alas that from the sound of these fourandtwenty the caravan passed and the day grew late

persian_text: یک گره را ظاهر سالوس زهد نور باید تا بود جاسوس زهد
english_translation: In the case of one class of people the hypocritical appearance of asceticism light is needed that may be a spy on asceticism

persian_text: غافلی ناگه به ویران گنج یافت سوی هر ویران از آن پس میشتافت
english_translation: A careless man suddenly found the treasure in the ruin after that he was hastening to every ruin

persian_text: در نوا آرم بنفی این ساز را چون بمیری مرگ گوید راز را
english_translation: I play the tune of negation when you die death will declare the mystery

persian_text: ز آنکه پیوسته ست هر لوله به حوض خوض کن در معنی این حرف خوض
english_translation: Because every pipe is connected with the reservoir Dive dive into the meaning of these words

persian_text: قصد جنگ انبیا میداشتند جسم دیدند آدمی پنداشتند
english_translation: They were going to make war on the prophets they saw the body  they supposed he was a man

persian_text: تو به یک خواری گریزانی ز عشق تو به جز نامی چه میدانی ز عشق
english_translation: Thou art fleeing from Love because of a single humiliation what dost thou know of Love except the name

persian_text: دوستی ابله بود رنج و ضلال این حکایت بشنو از بهر مثال
english_translation: The friendship of the fool is woe and perdition hear this tale as a parable

persian_text: تو دلش خوش کن بگو میدان درست که حقیقت دختر ما جفت تست
english_translation: Gladden his heart and say Know for sure that our daughter is really your spouse

persian_text: از خیال زشت خود منگر به من بر محبان از چه داری س ظن
english_translation: Do not regard me from your evil fancy wherefore do you cherish ill thoughts against your lovers

persian_text: چون زمین برخاست از جو فلک نه شب و نه سایه باشد نه دلک
english_translation: When the earth is removed from the celestial atmosphere there is neither night nor shade nor sunset

persian_text: هم تو خود را بر کنی از بیخ خواب همچو تشنه که شنود او بانک آب
english_translation: You yourself will tear up your slumber by the roots like the thirsty man who heard the noise of the water

persian_text: بعد از آن این دو به بیهوشی روند والد و مولود آنجا یک شوند
english_translation: Afterwards these twain pass into unconsciousness there the begetter and the begotten become one

persian_text: پیلبچگانند اندر راهتان صید ایشان هست بس دلخواهتان
english_translation: The young elephants are on your road to hunt them down is what your hearts desire exceedingly

persian_text: مصطفی آمد که سازد هم دمی کلمینی یا حمیراء کلمی
english_translation: Mustafá came to make harmony Speak to me O Humayrá speak

persian_text: بر ملولان این مکرر کردنست نزد من عمر مکرر بردنست
english_translation: To the weary this is repetition in my eyes it is the bringing of repeated life

persian_text: هیچ کاسهگر کند کاسه تمام بهر عین کاسه نه بهر طعام
english_translation: Does any bowlmaker make a finished bowl for the sake of the bowl itself and not for the sake of the food

persian_text: کالهای که هیچ خلقش ننگرید از خلاقت آن کریم آن را خرید
english_translation: that Gracious One hath purchased the piece of goods that no people would look at on account of its shabbiness

persian_text: نه تنوری که در آن پنهان شود نه جوالی که حجاب آن شود
english_translation: No oven where he might be concealed nor any sack that might be a screen for him

persian_text: شه بر آن عقل و گزینش که تراست چون تو کان جهل را کشتن سزاست
english_translation: Fie upon such an understanding and choice as thou hast Twere fitting to kill a mine of folly like thee

persian_text: که به دعوی الهی شد دلیر اژدها گشت و نمیشد هیچ سیر
english_translation: That he dared to pretend to divinity he became a dragon and would never be sated

persian_text: هر که تازد سوی کعبه بیدلیل همچو این سرگشتگان گردد ذلیل
english_translation: Whoever speeds towards the Kaba without a guide becomes contemptible like these bewildered men

persian_text: بیسلاح این مرد خفته بر زمین من به هفت اندام لرزان چیست این
english_translation: This man is asleep on the earth unarmed I am trembling in my seven limbs  what is this

persian_text: ما رمیت إذ رمیت راست دان هر چه کارد جان بود از جان جان
english_translation: Know that true is thou didst not throw when thou threwest whatsoever the soul soweth is from the Soul of the soul

persian_text: چون کسی با عقل کل کفران فزود صورت کل پیش او هم سگ نمود
english_translation: When any one shows excessive ingratitude to Universal Reason the form of the universe appears to him a cur accordingly

persian_text: عذر خواه عقل کل و جان تویی جان جان و تابش مرجان تویی
english_translation: Thou art He who asketh pardon of the Universal Mind and Soul Thou art the Soul of the soul and the Splendour of the coral

persian_text: گفت طوطی را چه خواهی ارمغان کارمت از خطهی هندوستان
english_translation: He said to the parrot What present would you like me to bring for you from the land of India

persian_text: در آمدن مصطفی علیهالسلام از بهر عیادت هلال
english_translation: How Mustafá on whom be peace came into the Amírs stable to see the sick Hilál

persian_text: من بگویم او نگردد یار من بیصدا ماند دم گفتار من
english_translation: I speak it does not join with me the breath of my speech remains without echo

persian_text: آن کبوتر را که بام آموختست تو مخوان میرانش کان پر دوختست
english_translation: Do not call the pigeon that has learned the roof drive it away  for its wings are stuck

persian_text: چون ببندی تو سر کوزهی تهی در میان حوض یا جویی نهی
english_translation: When you stop the mouth of an empty pot and put it in a tank or river

persian_text: در جگر افتادهاستم صد شرر در مناجاتم ببین بوی جگر
english_translation: A hundred sparks of fire have fallen on my heart perceive in my orisons the smell of my heart

persian_text: عکس خود در صورت من دیدهای در قتال خویش بر جوشیدهای
english_translation: You have seen the reflexion of yourself in my form and have risen in fury to fight with yourself

persian_text: نی ز کوران کشت آید نه درود نه عمارت نه تجارتها و سود
english_translation: From the blind comes neither sowing nor reaping nor cultivation nor tradings and profit

persian_text: موسیا خود را خریدی هین برو خویشتن کم بین به خود غره مشو
english_translation: O Moses thou hast vaunted thyself Hark begone Have less regard for thyself be not selfdeluded

persian_text: گفت اه چون حکم راند بیدلی در میان آن دو عالم جاهلی
english_translation: Ah said he how shall a man without insight pronounce judgementan ignorant man between two who know

persian_text: پس یقین گشتش که جذبه زان سریست کار حق هر لحظه نادر آوریست
english_translation: Then it became certain to him that the attraction was from Yonder the action of God is producing marvels at every moment

persian_text: پس سر این تن حجاب آن سر است پیش آن سر این سر تن کافر است
english_translation: So then this bodily head is a screen to that head  before that head this bodily head is an infidel

persian_text: از خیالی دوست گیری خلق را چون نگیری شاه غرب و شرق را
english_translation: You make friends with people on the ground of a phantasy why do not you make friends with the King of west and east

persian_text: آنک شد موجود از وی هر عدمگر بدارد باقیش او را چه کم
english_translation: He by whom every nonexistence is made existentwhat damage would He suffer if He were to preserve it for ever

persian_text: زانک ابر آنچ دهد گریان دهد کف تو خندان پیاپی خوان نهد
english_translation: Because that which the cloud gives it gives with tears thy hand incessantly lays the dish with smiles

persian_text: یک سلامی نشنود پیر از خسی تا نپیچد عاقبت از وی بسی
english_translation: The Pír never hears a salaam from a base fellow without being exceedingly tormented by him in the end

persian_text: دیوشان از مکر این میگفت لیک مینمود این عکس در دلهای نیک
english_translation: The Demon was saying this to them from guile but in good hearts the reverse of this was apparent

persian_text: هم عیال تو بیاسودی اگر در میانه داشتی حجرهی دگر
english_translation: Your family too would be comfortable if it had another room in it

persian_text: آنچ میماند کنی دفنش تو زود اینچنین زشتی بدان چون گشته بود
english_translation: Thou quickly buriest that which remains since it had been made such an ugly thing by that

persian_text: حاصل آنک از هر ذکر ناید نری هین ز جاهل ترس اگر دانشوری
english_translation: The gist is that masculinity does not come from every male beware of the ignorant man if you are wise

persian_text: گفت حکمت را تو دانی کردگار من کنم پنهان تو کردی آشکار
english_translation: He said O Creator Thou knowest the wisdom  I conceal  Thou hast revealed it

persian_text: بیزبان گویند سرو و سبزهزار شکر آب و شکر عدل نوبهار
english_translation: The cypresses and the green orchard mutely thank the water and show gratitude for the justice of Spring

persian_text: هر گیا را کش بود میل علا در مزید است و حیات و در نما
english_translation: Every herb that has a propensity for upwards is in increase and life and growth

persian_text: قوم تو در کوه میگیرند گور در میان کوی میگیری تو کور
english_translation: Your kinsfolk are catching onagers in the mountains you are catching blind men in the streets

persian_text: بندهای کش خوی و خلقت این بود نه جهان بر امر و فرمانش رود
english_translation: The servant whose disposition and character is thisdoes not the world move according to his command and behest

persian_text: کژ مخوان ای راست خوانندهی مبین کیف آسی قل لقوم ظالمین
english_translation: Do not recite incorrectly O thou who recitest correctly the perspicuous Say how shall I be grieved for an unjust people

persian_text: مرگ بد با صد فضیحتای پدر تو شهیدی دیدهای از کیر خر
english_translation: Ecce mors nefanda cum centum opprobriis O pater num vidisti de veretro asini martyrem An abominable death with a hundred disgraces O father have you seen a martyr by an asss penis

persian_text: بر حدث چون زد قدم دنگش کند چونک کردش نیست همرنگش کند
english_translation: When Eternity comes in contact with the temporal it strikes it dumb when it has naughted it it makes it homogeneous

persian_text: ای تن اکنون دست خود زین جان بشو ور نمیشویی جز این جانی بجو
english_translation: O body now wash thy hands of this soul or if thou wilt not wash  seek another soul than this

persian_text: خلق را از گرگ غم لطفت شبان چون کلیمالله شبان مهربان
english_translation: Thy grace is the shepherd of all who have been created from the wolf of paina loving shepherd like Gods Kalím

persian_text: صد هزاران فضل داند از علوم جان خود را مینداند آن ظلوم
english_translation: He knows a hundred thousand superfluous matters connected with the sciences that unjust man does not know his own soul

persian_text: گندمی را زیر خاک انداختند پس ز خاکش خوشهها بر ساختند
english_translation: They cast a grain of wheat under earth then from its earth they raised up ears of corn

persian_text: خوان کشید او را کرامتها نمود آن شب اندر کوی ایشان سور بود
english_translation: He brought trays of food and showed him every courtesy on that night there was a feast in their parish

persian_text: مارگیرش دید پس بشناختش گفت از جان مار من پرداختش
english_translation: The snakecatcher saw him  then he recognised him and said My snake has emptied him of life

persian_text: ظلم چه بود وضع غیر موضعش هین مکن در غیر موضع ضایعش
english_translation: What is injustice To put out of its proper place beware do not let it be lost out of its place

persian_text: چون غزا ندهد زنان را هیچ دست کی دهد آنک جهاد اکبرست
english_translation: Since women are not at all adapted for fighting how should they be adapted for that which is the greater holy war

persian_text: غیر آواز عزیزان در صدور که بود از عکس دمشان نفخ صور
english_translation: Except the voices of holy men in their breasts from the repercussion of whose breath is the blast of the trumpet

persian_text: مشک با سقا بود ای منتهی ورنه از خود چون شود پر یا تهی
english_translation: The waterskin is with the watercarrier O adept else how should it become full or empty by itself

persian_text: این سخن پایان ندارد آن گروه صورتی دیدند با حسن و شکوه
english_translation: This topic is endless The company espied a beauteous and majestic portrait

persian_text: چون سگان کوی پر خشم و مهیب اندر افتادند در دلق غریب
english_translation: as the streetdogs wrathful and terrible have fallen upon the frock of a stranger

persian_text: چشم میمالم بهر لحظه که من خواب میبینم خیال اندر زمن
english_translation: At every moment I rub my eyes whether I am dreaming and beholding a phantom in time

persian_text: ما و اصحابم چو آن کشتی نوح هر که دست اندر زند یابد فتوح
english_translation: I and my Companions are as the Ship of Noah whoso clings will gain graces

persian_text: صبحدم چون تیغ گوهردار خود از نیام ظلمت شب بر کند
english_translation: At morning tide when He draws His sheeny sword from the scabbard of the darkness of night

persian_text: آن مجاز است این حقیقتای خران نیست مسجد جز درون سروران
english_translation: That is phenomenal this is real O asses The mosque is naught but the hearts of the captains

persian_text: چشم میمالیم اینجا باغ نیست یا بیابانیست یا مشکل رهیست
english_translation: We rub our eyes no garden is here tis either a desert or a difficult road

persian_text: ماه گردون چون درین گردیدنست گاه تاریک و زمانی روشنست
english_translation: Since the moon of heaven is in making this circuit she is sometimes dark and sometimes bright

persian_text: مکر او سر زیر و او سر زیر شد روزگاری برد و روزش دیر شد
english_translation: His cunning went headlong  and he went headlong he passed a little while and his day set

persian_text: ذکر موسی بهر روپوشست لیک نور موسی نقد تستای مرد نیک
english_translation: The mention of Moses serves for a mask but the Light of Moses is thy actual concern O good man

persian_text: این به صورتگر نه در گورست پست گورها در دودمانش آمدست
english_translation: If to outward seeming this man is not laid low in the grave graves have entered into his household

persian_text: مرده باید بود پیش حکم حق تا نیاید زخم از رب الفلق
english_translation: One must be dead in presence of the decree of God so that no blow may come from the Lord of the daybreak

persian_text: که چه خسپی آخر اندر رز نگر این درختان بین و آثار و خضر
english_translation: Why said he dost thou sleep Nay look at the vines behold these trees and marks and green plants

persian_text: در بیان آنکه طلبیدن پیغامبر علیهالسلام مکه را و غیر مکه را بجهت دوستی ملک دنیا نبود چون فرموده است که الدنیا جیفه بلکه به امر بود
english_translation: Explaining that the motive of the Prophet on whom be peace in seeking to conquer Mecca and other than Mecca was not love of worldly dominion inasmuch as he has said This world is a carcase but that on the contrary it was by the command

persian_text: بس ثنایت گفتمی ای خوش خصالگر مرا یک رمز میگفتی ز حال
english_translation: I should have spoken much praise of you O man of good qualities if you had given me a single hint as to the case

persian_text: کاسه بر کاسهست و نان بر نان مدام از برای این شکمخواران عام
english_translation: There are always bowls on bowls and loaves on loaves for these vulgar bellygods

persian_text: از برای حق صحبت سالها باز گو حالی از آن خوش حالها
english_translation: For the sake of our years of companionship recount one of those sweet ecstasies

persian_text: چون که چیزی فوت خواهد شد در آب ترک کمتر گوی و بهتر را بیاب
english_translation: Since something will be lost in the water take leave of the less and gain the better

persian_text: پس بمعنی سوی بیصورت شدی گرچه زان مقصود غافل آمدی
english_translation: Therefore in reality you go to the formless  though you are unaware of that object

persian_text: یا الهی سکرت ابصارنا فاعف عنا اثقلت اوزارنا
english_translation: O my God our eyes have been intoxicated Forgive us our burdens have been made heavy

persian_text: بین که با بسیاری ما بر بساط تنگ میآید شما را انبساط
english_translation: Consider that notwithstanding the multitude of us on the earth you find it insufficient for your enjoyment

persian_text: یک شب اعرابی زنی مر شوی را گفت و از حد برد گفتوگوی را
english_translation: One night a Bedouin woman said to her husbandand she carried talk beyond bounds

persian_text: تا حلیمی زمین شد جمله قهر برد قارون را و گنجش را به قعر
english_translation: So that the graciousness of the Earth turned entirely to wrath and she bore Qárún and his treasure down to the abyss

persian_text: گفت توبه کردم از جبرای عیار اختیارست اختیارست اختیار
english_translation: He said O cunning knave I make a recantation of Necessitarianism there is freewill there is freewill freewill

persian_text: این فلان شیخست از ابدال خدا دست او را تو چرا کردی جدا
english_translation: This is suchandsuch a Shaykh of the Abdál of God why have you severed his hand

persian_text: بهر این آوردمان یزدان برون ما خلقت الانس الا یعبدون
english_translation: For this God brought us forth  I did not create mankind except to serve Me

persian_text: قطرهای ز ایمانش در بحر ار رود بحر اندر قطرهاش غرقه شود
english_translation: If a single drop of his Faith enter into the ocean the ocean will be submerged in his drop

persian_text: سهل دادی زانک ارزان یافتی در ندیدی حقه را نشکافتی
english_translation: Thou gavest up easily because thou gottest cheap thou didst not see the pearl thou didst not split the casket

persian_text: حاضریام هست چون مکر و کمین نقش آخر ز آینهی اول ببین
english_translation: My readiness is like guile and ambush behold the image of the end in the mirror of the beginning

persian_text: ضد ابراهیم گشت و خصم او وآن دو لشکر کینگزار و جنگجو
english_translation: He became the antagonist and adversary of Abraham and those two armies waged war and sought battle

persian_text: خواه ز آدم گیر نورش خواه از او خواه از خم گیر میخواه از کدو
english_translation: Do thou receive His light either from Adam or from Himself take the wine either from the jar or from the gourd

persian_text: چون ندانی دانش آهنگری ریش و مو سوزد چو آنجا بگذری
english_translation: If you are ignorant of the science of the ironsmith your beard and hair will be burned when you pass by that place

persian_text: آن پدر سگ نیست تاثیر جفاست که چنان حرمت نظر را سگ نماست
english_translation: That father is not a cur tis the effect of injustice that such mercy appears to thy sight a cur

persian_text: که اگر بیرون فتم زین شهر و کامای عجب بینم بدیده این مقام
english_translation: Saying Oh I wonder if I fall outside of this city and pleasure shall I see with my eye this dwellingplace

persian_text: هیچ قلبی پیش او مردود نیست زانک قصدش از خریدن سود نیست
english_translation: With Him no base coin is rejected for His object in buying is not profit

persian_text: غافلند این خلق از خودای پدر لاجرم گویند عیب همدگر
english_translation: These people take no heed of themselves O father consequently they blame one another

persian_text: کو نشان عشق و ایثار و رضاگر درستست آنچ گفتی ما مضی
english_translation: Where are the signs of love and charity and being pleased  if what thou hast said of what passed is true

persian_text: بدگهر را علم و فن آموختن دادن تیغی به دست راهزن
english_translation: To teach the evilnatured man knowledge and skill is to put a sword in the hand of a brigand

persian_text: آن دل قاسی که سنگش خواندند نامناسب بد مثالی راندند
english_translation: When they called a hard heart stony that was inappropriate they made it serve as a similitude

persian_text: قسم غلام در صدق و وفای یار خود از طهارت ظن خود
english_translation: How the slave from the purity of his thought swore to the truth and loyalty of his friend

persian_text: ابرهه با پیل بهر ذل بیت آمده تا افکند حی را چو میت
english_translation: Abraha came with the elephant to dishonour the House  that he might throw down the living as though dead

persian_text: آن فراخی بیابان تنگ گشت بر تو زندان آمد آن صحرا و دشت
english_translation: The spaciousness of the desert becomes narrow  that desert and plain becomes a prison to you

persian_text: نه بگفتست آن سراج امتان این جهان و آن جهان را ضرتان
english_translation: Hath not the Lamp of the peoples called this world and that world the two fellowwives

persian_text: بود ابر و رفته از وی خوی ابر اینچنین گردد تن عاشق به صبر
english_translation: The cloud was  but the cloudnature had gone from it the body of the lover becomes like this by means of renunciation

persian_text: زاغ در رز نعرهی زاغان زند بلبل از آواز خوش کی کم کند
english_translation: the crow caws in the orchard how should the nightingale cease its sweet song

persian_text: همچو نوری تافته بر حایطی حایط آن انوار را چون رابطی
english_translation: The Light of God in relation to phenomena is as a light shining upon a wallthe wall is a link for these splendours

persian_text: پای او میسوخت از تعجیل و راه بسته از جوق زنان همچو ماه
english_translation: He was hurrying along hotfoot and the way was blocked by a crowd of women as the moon

persian_text: گفت دختر را کزین داماد نو خویشتن پرهیز کن حامل مشو
english_translation: He said to his daughter Guard thyself from this new bridegroom do not become with child

persian_text: گر روانم را پژولانند زود صد در محنت بریشان بر گشود
english_translation: If they vex my spirit a hundred doors of tribulation will at once be opened for them

persian_text: تا کنون از بهر یک گاو این لعین میزند فرزند او را در زمین
english_translation: till for the sake of a cow this accursed wretch is now felling his son to the earth

persian_text: هر گمان تشنهی یقینست ای پسر میزند اندر تزاید بال و پر
english_translation: O son every opinion is thirsting for certainty and emulously flapping its wings

persian_text: صورتش بر جاست این سیری ز چیست عاشقا واجو که معشوق تو کیست
english_translation: Its form is still there whence this satiety  O lover inquire who your beloved is

persian_text: آتش که اول ز آهن میجهد او قدم بس سست بیرون مینهد
english_translation: The fire that first darts from the steel puts forth its foot very feebly

persian_text: چه زیان استش از آن نقش نفور چون که جانش غرق شد در بحر نور
english_translation: What loss does it suffer from that abhorred shape inasmuch as its spirit was plunged in the ocean of light

persian_text: کوهها بینی شده چون پشم نرم نیست گشته این زمین سرد و گرم
english_translation: You will see that the mountains have become soft as wool this Earth of hot and cold has become naught

persian_text: هست بسیار اهل حال از صوفیان نادر است اهل مقام اندر میان
english_translation: There is many a one of the Súfís who enjoys hál he that has attained to maqám is rare amongst them

persian_text: نقش با نقاش پنجه میزند سبلتان و ریش خود بر میکند
english_translation: the picture struggles hand to hand with the Painter  it tears out its own moustaches and beard

persian_text: وعدهی اهل کرم گنج روان وعدهی نااهل شد رنج روان
english_translation: The promise of the noble is a flowing treasure the promise of the unworthy becomes anguish of soul

persian_text: استخوانها رفته جمله جان شده تخت و تخته آن زمان یکسان شده
english_translation: Bones vanish and become spirit entirely throne and bench at that moment become alike
